title: Duong Luu
compiled_truth: Duong Luu is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-04-10 to 2002-02-06), Duong Luu sent 15 and received 155 emails, totalling 170 interactions. Top correspondents: [Cara Semperger](people/cara-semperger) (11), [Steve Nat](people/steve-nat) (7), [Corry Bentley](people/corry-bentley) (6), [David Poston](people/david-poston) (5), [W  White](people/w-white) (5).
